modal.tab.name: [ Name ]
modal.youtube.install_hash_mismatch: The downloaded Deno runtime failed integrity verification.
modal.youtube.resolve_failed: Could not resolve the YouTube audio stream.
modal.youtube.no_audio_formats: YouTube did not offer a compatible audio format for this video. YouTube changes its restrictions frequently; try again later or after updating Reverbic.
modal.youtube.post_live_not_ready: This video comes from a live stream that just ended. YouTube is still processing the recording and has not published the audio yet — try again in a few hours.
modal.youtube.live_not_supported: This video is a live stream happening right now. Reverbic cannot play live broadcasts yet — you can listen to it once the stream ends and YouTube processes the recording.
modal.youtube.auth_required: This video requires signing in to YouTube (due to age restrictions, region blocks, record label policies, or being private/members-only). Configure a cookies.txt file in Settings > YouTube Cookies File to access it.
modal.youtube.cookies_expired: Your YouTube cookies appear to be expired or invalid. Export a fresh cookies.txt from a private/incognito window and update the path in Settings.
modal.youtube.cookies_invalid_path: The cookies file could not be found or read.
modal.youtube.cookies_not_a_file: The cookies path must point to a file, not a folder.
modal.youtube.cookies_too_large: The cookies file is too large to be a valid cookies.txt.
modal.youtube.retry_hint: Type again or press Enter to retry.
modal.youtube.search.mix_hint: Press Ctrl+R on a video to start an infinite radio
modal.youtube.bookmarks_empty: No bookmarks. Press Alt+F on a video to save it locally, no account needed.
modal.youtube.auth_notice.title: YouTube sign-in required
modal.youtube.auth_notice.body: To access your Liked videos and playlists you need to authenticate with a cookies.txt (Settings > YouTube Cookies File). To just save videos use [ Bookmarks ]: it works without an account.
modal.youtube.auth_notice.risk: Use a secondary account — never your main Google account. Read the risks in the guide before you start.
modal.youtube.mix_failed: Could not build a mix from this video.
modal.youtube.mix_requires_cookies: YouTube Radio needs a configured cookies.txt — YouTube blocks mixes for unauthenticated requests. Set it in Settings > YouTube Cookies File.
modal.spotify.auth_notice.title: Spotify sign-in required
modal.spotify.auth_notice.body: Spotify requires signing in to search and play music. Before connecting, create your own app in the Spotify Developer Dashboard and set your Client ID — the guide explains every step.
modal.spotify.auth_notice.requirements: A Spotify Premium account is required. Review the guide and its legal notes before you start.
modal.spotify.start_on_spotify: Go to Spotify tab on connect
modal.spotify.devices_native_hint: Native mode is active: remote devices can be viewed, but are not used as the target.
modal.spotify.no_device.title: No Spotify device detected
modal.spotify.no_device.mode: You are in Remote mode: music plays on an external Spotify device.
modal.spotify.no_device.body: Open Spotify on a device (phone, computer or web player in your browser) and keep it open. This tab will unlock automatically as soon as a device is detected.
modal.empty.type_to_search: Type the name to search radios worldwide
modal.rename.title: Rename favorite
config.tooltip.autoplay: Automatically play the last station when Reverbic starts.
config.tooltip.restore_volume: Restore the last volume level when starting Reverbic.
config.tooltip.crossfade: Duration of the crossfade effect when switching between radio stations. 0 = direct cut.
config.tooltip.youtube_crossfade: Duration of the predictive crossfade effect when playing YouTube playlists. 0 = direct cut.
config.tooltip.volume_step: Amount to increase or decrease volume on each step.
config.tooltip.prebuffer: Seconds of audio to buffer before playing on-demand. Higher = slower start but more stable.
config.tooltip.overlay: When to show the floating Now Playing overlay.
config.tooltip.overlay_style: Full: shows station, track, recent tracks and VU meter. Compact: shows only station and current track.
config.tooltip.overlay_alpha: Overlay opacity. Lower value = more transparent.
config.tooltip.overlay_position: Corner of the screen where the overlay appears.
config.tooltip.screensaver: Idle time before the fullscreen ambient mode activates.
config.tooltip.duck: Lower Reverbic volume when audio from another app is detected.
config.tooltip.duck_volume: Minimum volume level while ducking is active.
config.tooltip.media_keys: Control Play/Pause and Stop with keyboard media keys.
config.tooltip.tray: Show the Reverbic icon in the system tray.
config.tooltip.notifications: Send system notifications when the track changes.
config.tooltip.auto_update: Automatically download and apply updates when a new version is available.
theme.picker.title: Theme
notice.spotify_not_premium: Your Spotify account is not Premium: playback will not work, only search and browsing
modal.device_picker.title: Spotify devices
integrations.spotify.error.premium_requi: This feature requires a Spotify Premium account
integrations.spotify.error.not_authorize: Account not authorized — add your email to the allowlist in the Spotify Developer Dashboard
integrations.spotify.error.development_m: Spotify rejected access because of Development Mode. Check that the app owner has Premium and this account is in the Developer Dashboard allowlist.
integrations.spotify.error.invalid_clien: Invalid or missing Client ID. Go to Settings (Alt+O) > Spotify Client ID.
integrations.spotify.error.generic: Could not connect to Spotify. Try signing in again.
modal.spotify.rate_limited: Spotify rate limit reached. Wait a few minutes and try again.
config.tooltip.spotify_stop_on_quit: Only in Remote mode. Stops playback when closing Reverbic.
config.tooltip.spotify_start_on_spotify: Automatically switches to the Spotify tab on connect.
help.overlay.title: Shortcuts
config.tooltip.screensaver_clock: Show the big digital clock in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_logo: Show the Reverbic logo in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_visualizer: Show the audio visualizer in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_recent_tracks: Show recently played tracks in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_progress_bar: Show playback progress in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_station_detai: Show the station's country, language, codec, tags, and website in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.screensaver_now_playing: Show the source and the current song (artist, title, and album) in the fullscreen ambient mode.
config.tooltip.spotify_client_id: Your Spotify app Client ID from developer.spotify.com. Required to connect. Press Space to edit.
config.tooltip.spotify_playback_mode: Choose whether Spotify uses a connected device, Reverbic's local player, or automatic selection.
config.tooltip.spotify_crossfade: Duration of the crossfade between Spotify tracks. 0 = direct cut. Only available when the playback mode is Native.
config.tooltip.spotify_radio_mode: When a song ends, automatically finds songs from the same artist and keeps playing.
config.tooltip.youtube_cookies_path: Path to a cookies.txt file (Netscape format) to access age-restricted, region-locked, or members-only YouTube videos. Use a secondary account, never your main one. Press Space to edit, leave empty to disable.
config.tooltip.youtube_radio_mode: When the list you are playing (search results, liked videos, or a playlist) ends, continue automatically with a mix of similar songs. Requires a configured cookies.txt (YouTube blocks mixes for unauthenticated requests).
config.tooltip.youtube_sponsorblock: Automatically skip non-music sections in YouTube music videos using the community SponsorBlock database. When enabled, the video ID is sent to sponsor.ajay.app.
config.tooltip.youtube_cookies_validate: Test the configured cookies.txt against YouTube to confirm the session is still valid. Press Enter to run the check.
config.spotify.no_client_id: No Client ID configured. Set it in Settings > Spotify Client ID.
integrations.spotify.error.no_remote_dev: No Spotify Connect device is available.
integrations.spotify.error.device_gone: The Spotify device did not respond; it seems to be closed. Open Spotify on a device and try again.
integrations.spotify.error.native_unavai: Spotify native playback is not available.
integrations.spotify.error.no_access_tok: The Spotify session is not ready. Sign in again.
integrations.spotify.error.playback_unav: No Spotify playback mode is available.
integrations.spotify.error.native_missin: Spotify native playback has no local credentials. Reconnect Spotify to enable local audio.
integrations.spotify.error.native_auth_f: Spotify remote control is connected, but native authorization did not complete. Reconnect Spotify to enable local audio.
integrations.spotify.error.native_sessio: Spotify native playback could not start a local session. Reconnect Spotify and try again.
integrations.spotify.error.native_audio_: No compatible audio backend was found for Spotify native playback.
integrations.spotify.error.native_mixer: Spotify native playback could not open the system audio mixer.
integrations.spotify.error.native_premiu: Your account needs Spotify Premium to play in native mode.
integrations.spotify.error.native_track_: This track is not available for native playback.
integrations.spotify.error.native_uri_in: Spotify native playback received an invalid URI.
integrations.spotify.error.native_generi: Spotify native playback failed. Check the log and try reconnecting Spotify.
modal.client_id.title: Spotify Client ID
modal.cookies_path.title: YouTube Cookies Path
modal.radio.subtab.favorites.label: Favorites
modal.favorites.empty: No favorites. Press Alt+F to add one.
modal.radio.subtab.playlists.label: Playlists
modal.playlists.empty: No playlists. Press N to create one, or Alt+P on a station to add it to a playlist.
modal.playlist_picker.title: Add to playlist
notice.playlist.no_active: No active playlist: play a station from a playlist
notice.playlist.name_taken: A playlist with that name already exists
modal.rename_playlist.title: Rename playlist
config.tooltip.discord_rpc: Shows the current station and track on your Discord profile.
config.tooltip.open_logs: Opens the folder containing Reverbic's log files, useful for bug reports.
config.tooltip.replay_onboarding: Replays the first-launch welcome and setup steps.
onboarding.welcome.heading: Hi there
onboarding.welcome.body: Your next favorite song could be just one Enter away.
onboarding.welcome.sources: Live radio, Spotify and YouTube: over 50,000 stations from around the world, waiting to be discovered.
onboarding.welcome.performance: Built 100% for non-stop listening, with the kind of performance only a terminal can deliver.
onboarding.appearance.heading: Make it yours
onboarding.overlay.heading: Your music, always in view with the overlay
onboarding.playback.heading: Tuned to you
onboarding.summary.heading: Ready to play
onboarding.summary.body: You can fine-tune all of this later from Settings. Now, let the music surprise you.
onboarding.summary.shortcuts: Tab switches tabs · Space pauses · Alt+O opens Settings
onboarding.maximize_hint: Maximize your terminal for a full experience
